description: This tailoring pattern is used for the Tailoring profession. It is sold by Quartermaster Enuril. In the Tailoring Patterns category. An item.
name: Pattern: Runic Spellthread

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Pattern: Runic Spellthread Item Level 75 Binds when picked up Requires Tailoring (375) Requires The Scryers - Exalted Use: Teaches you how to create Runic Spellthread. Sell Price: 9 Runic Spellthread Item Level 75 Requires Level 60 Use: Permanently embroiders spellthread into pants, increasing spell damage and healing by up to 35 and Stamina by 20. Max Stack: 20 Sell Price: 5 Requires Rune Thread , Primal Mana (10), Primal Nether This tailoring pattern is used for the Tailoring profession. It is sold by Quartermaster Enuril. In the Tailoring Patterns category. An item.
